openFindings.title: Append-mode phase scaffolding overwrites the existing parent packet's description.json
Existing phase-parent metadata is already stored under basename-only identity in both metadata roots
Already-corrupted phase-parent metadata needs a scoped dry-run repair pass after the writer fix
Explicit complete statuses bypass the new completion-evidence gate
openFindings.description: deriveStatus returns normalized frontmatter/table status before the patched completion_pct/tasks fallback, so status: Done can derive complete without the required evidence.

openFindings.title: MCP validation orchestrator ignores the explicit status-completion enforcement flag
No orchestrator-level regression test covers the explicit status-completion enforcement flag
Edge-case completion-evidence behavior lacks direct parser regression tests
openFindings.description: The shipped fallback handles the requested edge cases, but the parser suite does not directly pin malformed pct, quoted pct, comments-only tasks, empty implementation summary or derive-only concurrency behavior.

searchDebt.rationale: The iteration target was exact write-path inventory; strategy schedules a dedicated blast-radius scan later.
searchDebt.reason: Needs a path-aware JSON classifier rather than broad grep output.

searchDebt.rationale: The iteration target was determinism, not exhaustive blast-radius classification.
searchDebt.reason: Requires a path-aware JSON classifier to separate legitimate roots, archived scratch records, and corrupted nested parent packets.

searchDebt.rationale: The iteration target was same-corruption blast radius, so related historical drift was measured but not adjudicated as a new finding.
searchDebt.reason: Related drift is outside this Target 1 same-corruption count and needs its own data-quality audit before severity assignment.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The child loop is separate from the parent overwrite call and uses the child path.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified by direct read of generator arguments.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: No shift-style parser bug is needed or visible for the parent overwrite.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Direct parser read shows stable variable assignment before phase mode.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The deterministic parent overwrite occurs before child generation and does not depend on shared generator state.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: No module-level mutable state participates in the reviewed CLI path.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: Stale or missing metadata changes whether the bad payload overwrites or creates the file, not whether the parent write is attempted.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Canonical field construction ignores stale state for the fields involved in the corruption.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The direct parent writer is the earlier parent generation block.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: The child call target is the child folder path.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: No child-phase description overwrite was confirmed for the affected logical packet.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: The high-confidence candidate has identity/lineage corruption, but its description body still aligns with the parent spec purpose.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The proposed guard is limited to the parent call and leaves the child loop untouched.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified by direct read of separate parent and child generator calls.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The fix does not change direct child folder creation or child metadata generation, and the named classifier is unrelated to folder topology.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified against classifier source assumptions.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The specific file-presence-only fallback was removed.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified by direct read of the patched fallback.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The validator mismatch check exists and is tested for the required disagreement cases.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified by direct code and test reads.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: Default blocking behavior is not present for STATUS_COMPLETE_EVIDENCE_MISMATCH.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified by direct read of flag, resolver, and bridge.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: Fresh fallback does not coerce malformed pct to complete.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified by direct read of parser branch.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: Quoted numeric pct follows the same threshold check as numeric pct.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified by direct read of extraction and numeric parsing.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The vacuous no-open result is explicit helper behavior and does not contradict the written acceptance criteria.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Spec lacks a positive-task-count requirement.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: Empty content lacks pct and follows the null-pct non-complete branch.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Verified by direct read of parser branch.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The reviewed derive path is read-only and local-state-only for same-folder concurrent derives.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: No shared mutable deriveStatus state found.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: producer lines emit the legacy codes, and resolver fallback remains blanket grandfather behavior
ruledOutCandidates.reason: verified by direct read of producer and resolver branches

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The 108/108 count is not attributable to the two scoped files alone.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Broader-suite interpretation remains possible, but the two requested files contain only 47 test cases.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: The two targets are independent subsystems for this defect class.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: No shared import, env read, caller, or data path connects capability-flags.ts to the create.sh parent description writer.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: No typo or default-value mismatch found in the flag helper/resolver/CLI bridge path.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: All reviewed flag surfaces agree on the env name and report-mode default.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: Remaining issues are already active findings, not new coverage gaps.
ruledOutCandidates.reason: Prior iteration narratives and registry already capture the genuine gaps found so far.

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: child loop is not the direct parent overwrite cause
ruledOutCandidates.reason: verified by direct read of child generator call

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: flag helper itself is not defective
ruledOutCandidates.reason: helper and tests agree on env name/default

ruledOutCandidates.rationale: active findings are independent, not one shared defect
ruledOutCandidates.reason: prior cross-cutting pass found no coupling
